summary: Backend-only retest for VidVault iteration 5 (site-flag detector _probe_xhamster_flag). All 9 pytest cases pass (9/9). The new detector runs correctly: POST /api/analyze on https://hi.xhamster.desi/videos/8-9166610 returns supported=false with reason='The site has explicitly disabled downloads for “Vintage mother 8”. XHamster protects such videos with encrypted stream URLs — VidVault doesn't bypass a site's own download restrictions.' — proving the initials JSON was parsed, the title was extracted, and the site-flag reason takes precedence over the generic 'extractor couldn't find a playable stream' message. Regressions verified: YouTube short (supported=true, video+audio formats), direct MP4 (supported=true, video/mp4, size_bytes>0), example.com (supported=false, generic reason, xhamster branch NOT triggered), empty url→400, missing url field→422, ftp://→400.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py _probe_xhamster_flag() runs strictly AFTER the yt-dlp path fails (analyze() step 4), and its return value takes precedence over _friendly_yt_error() via 'site_reason or _friendly_yt_error(...)'. Verified end-to-end against hi.xhamster.desi — behavior matches the review request exactly.

Timebox: httpx.AsyncClient(timeout=10.0) inside _probe_xhamster_flag limits the additional latency to ≤10s as requested. Total analyze() latency for hi.xhamster.desi is bounded and observed <7s in this run.
Host guard: `if 'xhamster' not in host: return None` correctly scopes the detector — example.com regression test confirms the branch does NOT run for non-xhamster hosts (reason stays generic).

Regex `window\.initials\s*=\s*(\{.*?\});` with re.S is non-greedy and safe against multi-blob pages; json parse is guarded with try/except so a schema change degrades to the generic yt-dlp message rather than 500.
No mongodb _id serialization risk in this endpoint. No hardcoded URLs; EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL used from env in tests. server.py is 547 lines — within limits.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_analyze_api.py (strengthened test_analyze_xhamster_desi_friendly_error to assert 'disabled downloads' and the site title 'Vintage mother 8' are present in the reason, and that the older 'extractor couldn't find a playable stream' phrase is NOT present)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env (https://video-fetch-74.preview.emergentagent.com). Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_analyze_api.py (9 cases). Actual reason string produced by _probe_xhamster_flag() for hi.xhamster.desi/videos/8-9166610 (verified via curl): 'The site has explicitly disabled downloads for “Vintage mother 8”. XHamster protects such videos with encrypted stream URLs — VidVault doesn't bypass a site's own download restrictions.'
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature verification pass. All items in the review request are green.
